perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two females stand in a warehouse-style store, both holding oversized Mahjong-shaped plush pillows; one woman wears a fuzzy hat and purple cardigan, while the other has long dark hair and a black outfit. (2) They lift and rotate the pillows, which are labeled with the Mahjong symbols 'Eight Wan' and 'Fa', demonstrating the green textured backing and the significant thickness of the cushions. (3) The women smile and gesture toward the pillows while speaking, with store shelves and other shoppers visible in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat background music begins immediately alongside an energetic female voice speaking in Mandarin. (2) The acoustic environment includes faint ambient store noise, such as distant chatter and the sound of movement, though the main vocal remains dominant. (3) The speaker maintains a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone throughout the duration of the clip without significant audio transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '喜歡打麻將的朋友' (Friends who like playing Mahjong) and '過年必備 589元 麻將抱枕' (New Year Essential, 589 NTD, Mahjong Pillow) are displayed in bright, variety-show style fonts. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '八萬!' and '發!' appear in large, colorful characters to match the Mahjong tiles. (4) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators in the foreground, 1 male passerby in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female wears a grey fuzzy bucket hat and a purple knit cardigan; the second female has long dark hair and wears a black top with sheer sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large retail warehouse environment with high industrial ceilings, shelves stocked with clothing, and other customers walking with shopping carts.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific seasonal product (Mahjong-themed pillows) sold at Costco, using an energetic and humorous vlog style to attract shoppers looking for Lunar New Year decorations or gifts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of price (589 NTD), clear store location (Costco), and enthusiastic product demonstration.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy shopping recommendation with large variety-show captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the cultural significance of Mahjong in Chinese-speaking regions to create a 'must-buy' narrative for the Lunar New Year season.
